zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Radcliffe於1370年出生在英國藍卡爾博爾頓時，她的父親Ralph Radcliffe15歲，母親Elena Massey of Tatton6歲。她和Henry de Trafford至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1432年在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特聖 米可艾爾也斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Radcliffe was born in 1370, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, her father, Ralph Radcliffe, was 15 and her mother, Elena Massey of Tatton, was 6. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Henry de Trafford. She died in 1432, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in St Michael's Chapel, Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Radcliffe(이)가 1370년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Radcliffe(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elena Massey of Tatton(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 Henry de Trafford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터 스트 믹하얼'스 차플에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Radcliffe родилась в 1370 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Radcliffe было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena Massey of Tatton, 6. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Henry de Trafford. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел'с чапел, ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
